channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lincoln's big win, two-way tie lead exciting Gala Awards
item.description: An incredible year for Lincoln quarterback Akili Smith Jr. continued inside the Rock Church Tuesday when he became the second Hornet to win the Silver Pigskin trophy in its 26-year history.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Javier Mascherano arrives at Inter Miami as coach, 5 years after team first pursued him to play
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — The first few minutes of Javier Mascherano's introductory news conference as Inter Miami coach on Tuesday were rough. He was coughing, struggling to get words out and needed a few sips of water before finally calming down. “Air conditioning in Miami,” he explained.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High school recruiting isn't the only way to build a winner in the era of the transfer portal
item.description: Texas A&M signed the nation’s top-ranked recruiting class three years ago believing it had built a potential national title contender. Plenty of players from that heralded 2022 class could indeed be participating in the first 12-team College Football Playoff this month.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Talks on a new NHL CBA are set to start early next year. Here's why there is optimism
item.description: The NHL's collective bargaining agreement does not expire until Sept. 15, 2026. That discussions are set to begin on a new deal in early 2025 is already one step ahead of where hockey has been in labor negotiations in the past.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Illinois Football assistant coach dies at age 62
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (WCIA) -- Dana Dimel, the Senior Offensive Assistant for the Illinois Fighting Illini football team, has died. Illinois Athletics announced that the longtime coach passed away Tuesday at the age of 62. He is survived by his wife Julie and their children Winston and Joey.
item.dc:creator: Bradley Zimmerman, WGN 9

item.title: Israel Vázquez, the three-time world boxing champion from Mexico, dies at 46
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Israel Vázquez, the Mexican fighter who won three bantamweight world titles, has died at 46. World Boxing Council president Mauricio Sulaiman announced the death on Tuesday. The boxer nicknamed “El Magnifico” revealed on Nov. 10 he had sarcoma, a cancer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ryggs Johnston goes from a tiny Montana town to Australian Open champion: Analysis
item.description: A pair of Americans delivered command performances halfway around the world during Thanksgiving week. One was Peter Uihlein, the former U.S. Amateur champion and two-time Walker Cup player, winning by five shots in Qatar on the Asian Tour.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ryan Poles to remain Bears general manager and lead search for new head coach
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — While his first head coaching hire is now out, Ryan Poles is still the general manager of the Chicago Bears — for now.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays respond to Pinellas commissioner's letter on stadium deal
item.description: The President of the Tampa Bay Rays has sent a response letter to the Pinellas County Board of County Commissioners following the letter to the baseball team last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus after skid marked by poor decisions late in games
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss at Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Tennessee head coach Bill Battle dies at 82
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (WATE) -- Former University of Tennessee Coach William "Bill" Battle III died on Thanksgiving morning at the age of 82, according to the university.
item.dc:creator: Hope McAlee, NewsNation

item.title: Taylor Swift spends Black Friday amid sea of red as boyfriend Travis Kelce's Chiefs face the Raiders
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Pop superstar Taylor Swift was spending Black Friday amid a sea of red to watch her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they played the Las Vegas Raiders in a chilly matinee at Arrowhead Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Oakland youth football team raises funds for national championship trip
item.description: (KRON) -- One of the Bay Area's top youth football programs has qualified for the 2024 Pop Warner Championship. However, the East Bay Warriors 13U team will need the community's support to help get them there.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lions beat Bears 23-20 to extend win streak to 10 games
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jared Goff threw two touchdown passes to Sam LaPorta, Jake Bates made three field goals in the first half and the Detroit Lions held off the Chicago Bears 23-20 on Thursday to extend their winning streak to 10 games. The Lions snapped a seven-game losing streak on Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago looks to break Boston's 6-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (15-3, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (8-12, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Orlando takes on Chicago, aims for 4th straight win
item.description: Chicago Bulls (8-11, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Orlando Magic (12-7, third in the Eastern Conference) Orlando, Florida; Wednesday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Judge tosses suit to block trans athlete from NCAA women's tourney
item.description: The judge also noted in his ruling that "no defendant disputed that San Jose State rosters a trans woman volleyball player.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: 2 companies cut ties with Conor McGregor
item.description: Proximo Spirits, the owner of Irish whiskey brand Proper No. 12, will no longer feature McGregor’s name.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation
